# Launcher — shadcn Composition

> A Raycast-style ⌘K command launcher for complex ecosystems. Built on shadcn primitives (Command, Dialog, Badge, Separator) with Zustand state management.

## Install

```bash
npx shadcn add https://launcher.tunajam.com/r/launcher.json
```

## Dependencies
- zustand (state management)
- fuse.js (fuzzy search)
- @phosphor-icons/react (icons)
- shadcn: command, dialog, badge, separator

## Quick Start

```tsx
// 1. Define your manifest
const manifest: LauncherItem[] = [
  {
    id: "teams",
    name: "Teams",
    description: "Manage your teams",
    icon: Users,
    category: "Apps",
    tags: ["people", "teams"],
    children: [
      {
        id: "teams-my",
        name: "My Teams",
        description: "Your team memberships",
        icon: User,
        category: "Apps",
        tags: ["my", "teams"],
      },
    ],
  },
];

// 2. Create the store
const useLauncherStore = createLauncherStore({ manifest });

// 3. Add to your layout
<Launcher store={useLauncherStore} />
```

## LauncherItem Type

```ts
interface LauncherItem {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description?: string;
  icon: PhosphorIcon;
  category: string;
  tags: string[];
  aliases?: string[];
  keywords?: string[];
  prefixes?: string[];
  children?: LauncherItem[];
  action?: () => void;
  url?: string;
}
```

## Features
- ⌘K to open/close
- Hierarchical drill-down with breadcrumbs
- Fuzzy search (weighted: name > aliases > keywords > tags > description)
- Sidebar category filtering
- Recents & favorites (localStorage persistence)
- Full keyboard navigation (arrows, Enter, Escape, Backspace)
- Escape pops back one level, closes at root
- Selecting from favorites reconstructs full navigation path
- Pure shadcn tokens — inherits your theme
- Zustand store with selectors for optimal re-renders

## Keyboard Shortcuts
| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| ⌘K / Ctrl+K | Toggle launcher |
| ↑↓ | Navigate results |
| Enter | Select / drill into |
| Escape | Go back / close |
| Backspace (empty) | Pop breadcrumb level |

## Customization
- Override sidebar categories by passing a custom `categories` array
- Override search weights via store configuration
- All styling uses shadcn tokens — works with any theme
- Icons use @phosphor-icons/react — swap to lucide or any icon library

## Example with Custom Categories

```tsx
import { 
  Launcher, 
  createLauncherStore, 
  type Category 
} from "@/registry/new-york/launcher/launcher";
import { SquaresFour, Folder, Settings } from "@phosphor-icons/react";

const categories: Category[] = [
  { id: "all", name: "All", icon: SquaresFour },
  { id: "__recent", name: "Recent", icon: ClockCounterClockwise },
  { id: "__favorites", name: "Favorites", icon: Star },
  { isDivider: true },
  { id: "Files", name: "Files", icon: Folder },
  { id: "Settings", name: "Settings", icon: Settings },
];

const useLauncherStore = createLauncherStore({ manifest });

<Launcher store={useLauncherStore} categories={categories} />
```

## Example with Custom Branding

```tsx
import { Launcher, createLauncherStore } from "@/registry/new-york/launcher/launcher";
import { Rocket } from "@phosphor-icons/react";

const branding = {
  icon: <Rocket size={12} weight="fill" className="text-primary/40" />,
  label: "my-app",
};

const useLauncherStore = createLauncherStore({ manifest });

<Launcher store={useLauncherStore} branding={branding} />
```

## Advanced: Custom Search Weights

```tsx
import { createLauncherStore } from "@/registry/new-york/launcher/launcher";

const useLauncherStore = createLauncherStore({
  manifest,
  searchWeights: {
    name: 4.0,
    aliases: 3.0,
    keywords: 2.0,
    tags: 1.5,
    description: 0.3,
  },
});
```

## Store API

The store returned by `createLauncherStore()` exposes:

```ts
interface LauncherState {
  // State
  open: boolean;
  query: string;
  selectedCategory: string | null;
  navigationStack: NavigationLevel[];
  recents: string[];
  favorites: string[];

  // Actions
  setOpen: (open: boolean) => void;
  setQuery: (query: string) => void;
  setSelectedCategory: (category: string | null) => void;
  selectItem: (item: LauncherItem) => void;
  pushNavigation: (item: LauncherItem) => void;
  popNavigation: () => void;
  resetNavigation: () => void;
  toggleFavorite: (id: string) => void;
  setNavigationStack: (updater) => void;

  // Computed
  getBreadcrumbs: () => string[];
  getDisplayResults: () => LauncherItem[];
}
```

## Persistence

Recents and favorites are automatically persisted to localStorage. Default key: `launcher-storage`.

Override with:

```tsx
const useLauncherStore = createLauncherStore({ 
  manifest,
  persistKey: "my-app-launcher" 
});
```

## Testing

The store disables localStorage persistence when `NODE_ENV === "test"` for deterministic testing.

## Architecture

- **State management:** Zustand with persist middleware
- **Search:** Fuse.js with configurable weights
- **UI:** shadcn Command + Dialog (cmdk under the hood)
- **Icons:** @phosphor-icons/react
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS with shadcn tokens

## Live Demo

https://launcher.tunajam.com

MIT
